raw.message:
Mega Angebote bei Mega SIM!
📱 Unlimited surfen für mtl. 31,99 €
📱 0 € Anschlusspreis
📱 Mit bis zu 300 Mbit/s

hook.summary: Unfolding a crumpled paper to reveal a hidden message.
hook.visual_action: A person's hands are shown unfolding a crumpled white piece of paper on a dark grey table.

scene_flow: Hands begin to unfold a crumpled piece of paper on a dark table.
The paper is flattened to reveal a handwritten mobile plan offer for 'UNLIMITED MAX'.
A zoom-in effect highlights the '31,99€' price point.
The video loops with a glitch transition back to the unfolding action.
audience_proxy: German-speaking consumers looking for affordable unlimited mobile data contracts.
